Everything in one place — itineraries, budgets, bookings. Absolutely love it!', rating: 5, }, { name: 'Marcus Johnson', role: 'Family Traveler', avatar: '👨‍👩‍👧‍👦', text: 'Planning a family vacation used to be stressful. TripNest made it seamless and actually fun. Highly recommended!', rating: 5, }, { name: 'Priya Patel', role: 'Travel Blogger', avatar: '✈️', text: 'As a travel blogger who visits 30+ countries a year, TripNest is my go-to tool for every trip. Incredibly powerful.', rating: 5, }, ]; const blogPosts = [ { tag: 'Travel Tips', title: 'Creating Streamlined Safeguarding Processes with TripNest', img: '🌏', gradient: 'from-emerald-400 to-teal-500', }, { tag: 'Insights', title: 'What are your safeguarding responsibilities and how can you manage them?', img: '🔒', gradient: 'from-blue-400 to-indigo-500', }, { tag: 'Strategy', title: 'Leveraging the Membership Model with Traction Australia', img: '🚀', gradient: 'from-purple-400 to-pink-500', }, ]; const clientLogos = [ { name: 'Airbnb', icon: '🏠' }, { name: 'Booking', icon: '📅' }, { name: 'Expedia', icon: '✈️' }, { name: 'TripAdvisor', icon: '🦉' }, { name: 'Skyscanner', icon: '🔭' }, { name: 'Kayak', icon: '🚣' }, { name: 'Viator', icon: '🗺️' }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const { user } = useAuth(); return (
